A fence info-string containing a quote and a `<script>` payload breaks out of the attribute and injects a live script element.\n\nThis is not an issue if you fully trust every file under /content and every content adapter you load.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/security/advisories/GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gohugoio/hugo/security-advisories/GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo", "summary": "Hugo: XSS via unescaped code-fence language in default code block renderer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q76j-gcg9-vxc6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.163.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gohugoio/hugo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.60.0, < 0.163.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
